case_title: NORTHBROOK INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION vs. EDWARDS, LEON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHBROOK INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION SERVED APR-16-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, LEON
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHBROOK INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS, LEON DOES ONE THROUGH TEN, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-12-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-22-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-12-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-12-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NTO BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1993, CONTINUED TO JAN-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 CONTINUED FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS. SEE CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM JAN HARRIS, DATED JULY 14, 1993 RE US PETITION FOR BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEFENDANT LEON EDWARDS. CONTINUED BY ORDER OF HON LILLIAN K. SING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-20-1994, CONTINUED TO MAR-30-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
